programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade embarks on a mission in Guyana in South America.

programme.title: River Monsters - Freshwater Shark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the myth of the freshwater shark.

programme.title: River Monsters - Vampires of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Terminator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates three mysterious deaths in the remote western Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters - Canadian Horror
programme.desc: The hunt for a 20-foot lake monster that attacks humans in Canada's wilderness.

programme.desc: Jeremy goes on a dangerous mission where he discovers a deep-sea devil.

programme.title: River Monsters - The Mutilator
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: The Korean Dish Expedition - The Korean Dish Expedition Ep.13
programme.desc: The heirloom cuisine of Korea’s traditional clan families carries generations of wisdom rooted in harmony with nature. Some flavors have faded, others nearly forgotten?but at the refined yet simple tables set by the family matriarchs, viewers experience a moving journey back in time.

programme.title: The Hellbenders
programme.desc: After the civil war, a hell-bent Confederate Army Officer and his sons rob a Union Caravan carrying a fortune, killing every man and beast in the process. They hide the money in an empty coffin and hire a woman to pose as a widow to a dead officer to make it look official. Now they must con and fight their way across the west through thousands of cavalry, lawmen, bounty hunters, and Indians to make their escape.

programme.title: Blood and Bullets
programme.desc: A deadly manhunt takes three people through the sordid streets of the Philadelphia underworld, in search of killers and the truth, where every clue brings new questions

programme.title: Death Rides a Horse
programme.desc: A young gunfighter forms a tenuous alliance with an aging ex-outlaw to track down and eliminate the bandits who killed his family, till the surprising end.

programme.title: FIBA 3x3 World Cup Qualifier 2026
programme.desc: Held shortly after the FIBA 3x3 Asia Cup 2026 (1 to 5 Apr 2026), the FIBA 3x3 World Cup Qualifier 2026 will be hosted in Singapore on 11 to 12 Apr 2026, continuing an exciting period of global spotlight and elite 3x3 basketball action to The Kallang. As part of the Qualifiers, twelve national teams from Europe, South America, Africa and Asia will compete for the final six spots of the FIBA 3x3 World Cup 2026 in Warsaw, Poland, on 1 to 7 June 2026.

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Chainsaw Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in the Australian outback trying to catch the rare freshwater sawfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Colombian Slasher
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to Colombia to investigate a creature blamed for killing a new bride.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mekong Mutilator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to south east Asia's Mekong river in search of a baby-faced killer.

programme.title: River Monsters - Death Ray
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to Thailand in search of the 700lb giant freshwater stingray.

programme.title: River Monsters - Deep Sea Demon
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes in search of the truth behind the sea serpent legend.

programme.title: River Monsters - Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: Two men mysteriously vanish on a remote lake in Malaysia.

programme.title: River Monsters - Invisible Executioner
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to the Zambezi River in Africa.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy Wade investigates a rare giant fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic Pacific island, an ancient fishing community is being terrorised.

programme.title: River Monsters - Asian Slayer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Himalayas to investigate river attacks.

programme.title: River Monsters - Congo Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo River on the trail of the legend of the spirit Mami Wata.

programme.title: River Monsters - Japanese Horrors
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in Japan on the trail of the kappa, a fish about which legends abound.

programme.title: River Monsters - Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Jeremy is convinced a river monster is at large after hearing tales of a body-snatching.

programme.title: River Monsters - Ice Cold Killer
programme.desc: Travelling from London to Greenland and on to Norway.

programme.title: River Monsters - Rift Valley Killer
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade is on a quest to Africa's Great Rift Valley.

programme.title: River Monsters - Atomic Assassin
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade braves the radiation in Chernobyl on the trail of a monster fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Flesh Ripper
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to New Zealand looking for a dangerous creature described 200 years ago.

programme.title: River Monsters - Hidden Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to South Africa, where the biggest bull shark ever recorded was caught.

programme.title: River Monsters - South Pacific Terrors
programme.desc: Attacks from unseen assailants in the remote mountains and jungles of Fiji's interior.

programme.title: River Monsters - Alaska's Cold Water Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates a fatal incident in Alaska - is an unidentified killer at large?

programme.title: River Monsters - Amazon Assassins
programme.desc: In the depths of the Amazon, legends tell of an evil spirit in a great fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on the hunt for the notorious killer catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Razorhead
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates reports of a creature terrorizing the Florida Keys.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killers from the Abyss (Part 2)
programme.desc: Fishing detective, Jeremy Wade, continues the biggest investigation of his career.

programme.title: River Monsters - Terror in Paradise
programme.desc: Jeremy investigates tales of a mysterious shark-octopus hybrid called the Lusca.

programme.title: River Monsters - Silent Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Parana River in Argentina.

programme.title: Drink with God Season 2 - Drink with God Season 2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Singer Noh Sa-yeon, who never stops taking on new challenges, is here. Who is the man who opened a whole new chapter in her life? What dish would best express her gratitude despite a 30-year age gap?

programme.title: The Korean Dish Expedition - The Korean Dish Expedition Ep.14
programme.desc: The heirloom cuisine of Korea’s traditional clan families carries generations of wisdom rooted in harmony with nature. Some flavors have faded, others nearly forgotten?but at the refined yet simple tables set by the family matriarchs, viewers experience a moving journey back in time.

programme.title: Cheers Brother - Cheers Brother Episode 7
programme.desc: The team travels to Ulsan to discover one of Korea’s most popular traditional liquors among younger generations?sparkling makgeolli made using traditional brewing techniques. Surrounded by lush forests, they cook anju dishes that pair beautifully with the sparkling makgeolli while sharing heartfelt conversations.

programme.desc: Let the tasty adventure begin! From culture shock to culinary delight?this is their fun-filled journey into the heart of K-food.
